title: TypeScript-to-Go 1:1 Port of Claude Code CLI
description: Migrate the entire old-src/ TypeScript codebase to idiomatic Go packages for drastically improved memory efficiency. The Go port preserves all functionality: types, API client, query engine, tools, commands, TUI, services, and state management.

stories.title: Go Module Init & Core Types
acceptanceCriteria: go.mod exists at project root with module path github.com/jbeck018/claude-go
pkg/types/message.go defines Message, UserMessage, AssistantMessage, SystemMessage, ToolUseMessage structs matching old-src/types/message.ts
pkg/types/permissions.go defines PermissionMode, PermissionBehavior, PermissionRule, PermissionResult types matching old-src/types/permissions.ts
pkg/types/ids.go defines SessionId and AgentId branded string types with constructor functions matching old-src/types/ids.ts
pkg/types/tools.go defines ToolProgressData, BashProgress, AgentToolProgress types matching old-src/types/tools.ts
pkg/types/hooks.go defines HookProgress, PromptRequest, PromptResponse matching old-src/types/hooks.ts
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Tool Interface & Task System
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/tool/tool.go defines Tool interface with Call, Description, InputSchema, CheckPermissions, IsReadOnly, IsConcurrencySafe methods matching old-src/Tool.ts
pkg/tool/registry.go defines Tools type (slice of Tool) with FindByName, FilterEnabled helper functions
pkg/task/task.go defines TaskType, TaskStatus, TaskState, TaskContext types matching old-src/Task.ts
pkg/task/task.go implements GenerateTaskId with prefix-based IDs matching the TS implementation
pkg/task/task.go implements IsTerminalTaskStatus matching the TS logic
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/task/... passes with tests for GenerateTaskId and IsTerminalTaskStatus

stories.title: Configuration & Settings System
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/config/settings.go defines SettingsJson struct matching the shape from old-src/utils/settings/types.ts
pkg/config/loader.go implements LoadSettings reading from ~/.claude/settings.json with JSON unmarshaling
pkg/config/config.go implements GetGlobalConfig and SaveGlobalConfig matching old-src/utils/config.ts
pkg/config/env.go implements environment variable helpers (IsEnvTruthy, IsBareMode) matching old-src/utils/envUtils.ts
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/config/... passes

stories.title: Anthropic API Client with Streaming
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/api/client.go implements AnthropicClient with Create method for messages API
pkg/api/streaming.go implements SSE streaming parser that yields StreamEvent types matching old-src/types/message.ts (content_block_start, content_block_delta, message_stop, etc.)
pkg/api/auth.go implements API key loading from environment and config matching old-src/utils/auth.ts patterns
pkg/api/errors.go defines error types for rate limiting, prompt too long, and API errors matching old-src/services/api/errors.ts
pkg/api/retry.go implements exponential backoff retry with jitter matching old-src/services/api/withRetry.ts
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/api/... passes with mock server tests for streaming

stories.title: Application State Management
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/state/appstate.go defines AppState struct with fields matching old-src/state/AppStateStore.ts (messages, tasks, toolPermissionContext, settings, etc.)
pkg/state/store.go implements thread-safe Store with Get/Set/Update using sync.RWMutex
pkg/state/selectors.go implements key selector functions matching old-src/state/selectors.ts
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/state/... passes with concurrent access tests

stories.title: Context Building (System & User Prompts)
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/context/system.go implements GetSystemContext matching old-src/context.ts (git status, branch, recent commits)
pkg/context/user.go implements GetUserContext matching old-src/context.ts (CLAUDE.md loading, date injection)
pkg/context/claudemd.go implements CLAUDE.md file discovery and loading matching old-src/utils/claudemd.ts
pkg/context/git.go implements git helpers (GetBranch, GetDefaultBranch, GetIsGit, GetGitStatus) matching old-src/utils/git.ts
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/context/... passes

stories.title: Core Tools - BashTool
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/tools/bash/bash.go implements BashTool satisfying the Tool interface
BashTool executes shell commands via os/exec with configurable timeout matching old-src/tools/BashTool/BashTool.ts
BashTool captures stdout/stderr and returns ToolResult matching the TS output format
BashTool implements permission checking (IsReadOnly returns false, CheckPermissions validates against allow/deny rules)
BashTool supports background execution via run_in_background parameter
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/tools/bash/... passes with tests for command execution, timeout, and background mode

stories.title: Core Tools - FileReadTool, FileWriteTool, FileEditTool
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/tools/fileread/fileread.go implements FileReadTool with offset/limit parameters matching old-src/tools/FileReadTool/FileReadTool.ts
FileReadTool outputs content with line numbers (cat -n format) matching TS behavior
pkg/tools/filewrite/filewrite.go implements FileWriteTool matching old-src/tools/FileWriteTool/FileWriteTool.ts
pkg/tools/fileedit/fileedit.go implements FileEditTool with old_string/new_string/replace_all parameters matching old-src/tools/FileEditTool/FileEditTool.ts
FileEditTool validates old_string uniqueness and returns error if not unique (unless replace_all)
All three tools implement proper permission checking
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/tools/fileread/... ./pkg/tools/filewrite/... ./pkg/tools/fileedit/... all pass

stories.title: Core Tools - GlobTool & GrepTool
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/tools/glob/glob.go implements GlobTool with pattern matching using doublestar library, matching old-src/tools/GlobTool/GlobTool.ts
GlobTool returns matching file paths sorted by modification time
pkg/tools/grep/grep.go implements GrepTool that shells out to ripgrep (rg) matching old-src/tools/GrepTool/GrepTool.ts
GrepTool supports output_mode (content, files_with_matches, count), context lines (-A/-B/-C), head_limit, and case-insensitive search
Both tools are marked as read-only and concurrency-safe
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/tools/glob/... ./pkg/tools/grep/... all pass

stories.title: Query Engine (Main Conversation Loop)
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/query/engine.go implements QueryEngine with RunQuery method matching old-src/query.ts core loop
QueryEngine streams API responses, dispatches tool calls, collects results, and re-submits
QueryEngine handles concurrent tool execution for concurrency-safe tools
QueryEngine implements message normalization for API submission matching old-src/utils/messages.ts normalizeMessagesForAPI
QueryEngine handles interruption (abort signal) gracefully
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors
go test ./pkg/query/... passes

stories.title: Command System & Slash Commands
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/commands/command.go defines Command interface matching old-src/types/command.ts
pkg/commands/registry.go implements command registration and lookup by name/prefix
pkg/commands/help.go implements /help command
pkg/commands/compact.go implements /compact command for context compaction
pkg/commands/clear.go implements /clear command
pkg/commands/cost.go implements /cost command for token usage display
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Terminal UI with Bubbletea
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/tui/app.go implements the main bubbletea Model with Init/Update/View matching the REPL flow from old-src/screens/
pkg/tui/input.go implements multi-line text input with history matching old-src input handling
pkg/tui/message_view.go renders conversation messages (user, assistant, tool use/result) matching old-src/components/ rendering
pkg/tui/spinner.go implements animated spinner for in-progress operations
The TUI accepts user input, sends to QueryEngine, and streams responses
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: CLI Entry Point & Flags
acceptanceCriteria: cmd/claude-go/main.go implements CLI entry point using cobra matching old-src/main.tsx flag parsing
Supports flags: --model, --permission-mode, --verbose, --debug, --print, --add-dir, --allowedTools, --disallowedTools
Supports subcommands matching old-src commander setup (at minimum: claude-go, claude-go -p 'prompt')
Non-interactive (print) mode works: echo 'hello' | claude-go -p sends prompt and prints response
Interactive REPL mode launches the bubbletea TUI
go build ./cmd/claude-go/... produces a working binary
The binary starts and can complete a simple API round-trip

stories.title: AgentTool (Subagent Spawning)
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/tools/agent/agent.go implements AgentTool that spawns subagent goroutines matching old-src/tools/AgentTool/AgentTool.ts
Subagents run their own QueryEngine with isolated context
AgentTool supports model parameter for routing to different models
AgentTool supports run_in_background for async execution
Agent definitions are loaded from .claude/agents/ directory matching old-src/tools/AgentTool/loadAgentsDir.ts
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: MCP Client Integration
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/services/mcp/client.go implements MCP client that connects to stdio-based MCP servers
pkg/services/mcp/types.go defines MCPServerConnection, ServerResource types matching old-src/services/mcp/types.ts
MCP client can list tools from connected servers and expose them as Tool instances
MCP client handles tool calls by forwarding to the appropriate server
MCP server configuration is loaded from settings.json mcpServers field
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Remaining Tools Port
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/tools/websearch/ implements WebSearchTool matching old-src/tools/WebSearchTool/
pkg/tools/webfetch/ implements WebFetchTool matching old-src/tools/WebFetchTool/
pkg/tools/notebook/ implements NotebookEditTool matching old-src/tools/NotebookEditTool/
pkg/tools/lsp/ implements LSPTool matching old-src/tools/LSPTool/
pkg/tools/todowrite/ implements TodoWriteTool matching old-src/tools/TodoWriteTool/
pkg/tools/toolsearch/ implements ToolSearchTool matching old-src/tools/ToolSearchTool/
pkg/tools/askuser/ implements AskUserQuestionTool matching old-src/tools/AskUserQuestionTool/
pkg/tools/task/ implements TaskCreate, TaskGet, TaskUpdate, TaskList, TaskStop, TaskOutput tools
pkg/tools/plan/ implements EnterPlanMode, ExitPlanMode tools
pkg/tools/worktree/ implements EnterWorktree, ExitWorktree tools
pkg/tools/team/ implements TeamCreate, TeamDelete, SendMessage tools
pkg/tools/skill/ implements SkillTool matching old-src/tools/SkillTool/
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Remaining Commands Port
acceptanceCriteria: All slash commands from old-src/commands/ are ported to pkg/commands/

At minimum: /commit, /review, /diff, /config, /mcp, /resume, /session, /status, /tasks, /vim, /theme, /login, /logout, /doctor, /memory, /init, /context, /copy, /share, /rename, /color, /ide, /keybindings
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Services Port (Analytics, Compact, Cost Tracking)
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/services/compact/ implements context compaction matching old-src/services/compact/
pkg/services/cost/ implements cost tracking matching old-src/cost-tracker.ts
pkg/services/history/ implements conversation history matching old-src/history.ts
pkg/utils/log/ implements logging matching old-src/utils/log.ts
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Utilities Port
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/utils/messages/ implements message creation and normalization matching old-src/utils/messages.ts
pkg/utils/permissions/ implements permission checking logic matching old-src/utils/permissions/
pkg/utils/filestate/ implements file state cache matching old-src/utils/fileStateCache.ts
pkg/utils/theme/ implements terminal theming matching old-src/utils/theme.ts
pkg/utils/platform/ implements platform detection matching old-src/utils/platform.ts
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Integration Test & Memory Benchmark
acceptanceCriteria: End-to-end test: binary starts, accepts a prompt via -p flag, streams a response, and exits cleanly
End-to-end test: REPL mode starts, renders TUI, and handles Ctrl+C gracefully
Memory benchmark: Go binary RSS at idle is <50MB (vs typical Node.js ~150MB+)
Memory benchmark: Go binary RSS during a 10-turn conversation stays <200MB
All go test ./... pass across the entire project
go vet ./... reports zero issues
Binary size is <30MB
